code:
import io
import string
import list

fn add_token(_ nums: List<Int>, _ tok: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.len(tok) == 0
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(nums, v)
        nums
      else
        list.push(nums, v)
      end
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if (b >= 48 and b <= 57) or b == 45
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    else
      nums = add_token(nums, token)
      token = ""
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
nums = add_token(nums, token)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut remaining = nums
let total = list.len(remaining)
mut k = 0
while k < total
  match list.min(remaining)
  when Some(m)
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut removed = false
    let rlen = list.len(remaining)
    mut j = 0
    while j < rlen
      match list.get(remaining, j)
      when Some(x)
        if x == m and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, x)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

mut out = ""
let slen = list.len(sorted)
mut idx = 0
while idx < slen
  match list.get(sorted, idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
